WITH


source_data AS (
    SELECT

    
        kundeid,
        von,
        bis,
        strasse,
        hausnummer,
        adresszusatz,
        plz,
        ort,
        land,
        ldts

  FROM "postgres"."dv"."base_webshop_wohnort"

  ),





ldts_rsrc_data AS (

  SELECT
    CAST( ldts as TIMESTAMPTZ ) AS ldts,
    CAST( 'WEBSHOP' as VARCHAR ) AS rsrc,
      
        kundeid,
        von,
        bis,
        strasse,
        hausnummer,
        adresszusatz,
        plz,
        ort,
        land
    

  FROM source_data),




hashed_columns AS (

    SELECT

    
        ldts,
        rsrc,
        kundeid,
        von,
        bis,
        strasse,
        hausnummer,
        adresszusatz,
        plz,
        ort,
        land,
    COALESCE(LOWER(MD5(NULLIF(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CONCAT(
        COALESCE((

            '"' || REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM CAST(kundeid AS VARCHAR)), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--') || '"'

        ), '^^')
        ), '\n', '') 
        , '\t', '') 
        , '\v', '') 
        , '\r', '') AS VARCHAR), '^^'))), '00000000000000000000000000000000') AS hk_kunde_h,
    COALESCE(LOWER(MD5(NULLIF(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CONCAT(
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(strasse AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(hausnummer AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(adresszusatz AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(plz AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(ort AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^'),'||',
        COALESCE((CONCAT('"', REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(land AS VARCHAR), '\\', '\\\\'), '"', '\"'), '^^', '--'), '"')

        ), '^^')
        ), '\n', '') 
        , '\t', '') 
        , '\v', '') 
        , '\r', '') AS VARCHAR), '^^||^^||^^||^^||^^||^^'))), '00000000000000000000000000000000') AS hd_kunde_wohnort_s

    FROM ldts_rsrc_data
  
),

unknown_values AS (

    SELECT

    CAST(TO_TIMESTAMP('0001-01-01 00:00:01', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TIMESTAMPTZ) as ldts
    ,'SYSTEM' as rsrc
        , '(unknown)' as kundeid
        ,TO_DATE('0001-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) as von
        ,TO_DATE('0001-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) as bis
        , '(unknown)' as strasse
        , '(unknown)' as hausnummer
        , '(unknown)' as adresszusatz
        , '(unknown)' as plz
        , '(unknown)' as ort
        , '(unknown)' as land
        ,CAST('00000000000000000000000000000000' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_kunde_h
        ,CAST('00000000000000000000000000000000' as VARCHAR(32)) as hd_kunde_wohnort_s
),


error_values AS (

    SELECT

    CAST(TO_TIMESTAMP('8888-12-31 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TIMESTAMPTZ) as ldts
    ,'ERROR' as rsrc
        , '(error)' as kundeid
        ,TO_DATE('8888-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) as von
        ,TO_DATE('8888-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) as bis
        , '(error)' as strasse
        , '(error)' as hausnummer
        , '(error)' as adresszusatz
        , '(error)' as plz
        , '(error)' as ort
        , '(error)' as land
        ,CAST('ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff' as VARCHAR(32)) as hk_kunde_h
        ,CAST('ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff' as VARCHAR(32)) as hd_kunde_wohnort_s
),


ghost_records AS (
    SELECT * FROM unknown_values
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM error_values
),
columns_to_select AS (

    SELECT

    
        ldts,
        rsrc,
        kundeid,
        von,
        bis,
        strasse,
        hausnummer,
        adresszusatz,
        plz,
        ort,
        land,
        hk_kunde_h,
        hd_kunde_wohnort_s

    FROM hashed_columns
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT

    
        ldts,
        rsrc,
        kundeid,
        von,
        bis,
        strasse,
        hausnummer,
        adresszusatz,
        plz,
        ort,
        land,
        hk_kunde_h,
        hd_kunde_wohnort_s

    FROM ghost_records

)

SELECT * FROM columns_to_select
